zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite de Beaumont於大約1320年出生在法國皮卡迪艾斯波蒙特時，她的父親Robert de Brienne de Beaumont42歲，母親Marie de CRAON40歲。她於1338年5月17日與Bernard de Ventadour在法國努維勒-阿吉泰可雷結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1390年在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o波蒙特享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marguerite de Beaumont于大约1320年出生在法国皮卡迪艾斯波蒙特时，她的父亲Robert de Brienne de Beaumont42岁，母亲Marie de CRAON40岁。她于1338年5月17日与Bernard de Ventadour在法国努維勒-阿吉泰可雷结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1390年在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o波蒙特享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite de Beaumont was born about 1320, in Beaumont, Aisne, Picardie, France, her father, Robert de Brienne de Beaumont, was 42 and her mother, Marie de CRAON, was 40. She married Bernard de Ventadour on 17 May 1338, in Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1390, in Beaumont, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite de Beaumont est née environ 1320, à Beaumont, Aisne, Picardie, France, son père, Robert de Brienne de Beaumont, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Marie de CRAON, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Bernard de Ventadour le 17 mai 1338, à Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1390, à Beaumont, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite de Beaumont um 1320 in Beaumont, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Brienne de Beaumont 42 und ihre Mutter Marie de CRAON 40. Sie hat am 17. Mai 1338 in Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich Bernard de Ventadour geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1390 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Beaumont, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich.

ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Beaumontが約1320年にフランスピカーディエイスンビーウモントで生まれた時，父Robert de Brienne de Beaumontは42歳，母Marie de CRAONは40歳であった。1338年5月17日にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインコルeズでBernard de Ventadourと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1390年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスプウイ-デ-ドoメビーウモントで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Beaumont(이)가 대략 1320년 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 보몽에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Brienne de Beaumont(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marie de CRAON(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1338년 5월 17일 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 코e즈에서 Bernard de Ventadour(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1390년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 푸이-데-드o 보몽에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite de Beaumont родилась около 1320 г. в местности бомонт, эисн, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Robert de Brienne de Beaumont было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Marie de CRAON, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Bernard de Ventadour 17 мая 1338 г. в местности коррeз, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1390 г. в местности бомонт, пуи-де-дoм, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 71 год.
